_note: Per-head LightGBM hyperparameter overrides for MTA training (T28). When a head's name appears in `heads`, the listed key/value pairs override the matching entries in trainer.LGBM_PARAMS_BINARY or LGBM_PARAMS_REGRESSION for that head. Keys absent here keep their hardcoded defaults. Heads absent here use the hardcoded defaults verbatim. Populated by scripts/tune_hyperparams.py (T28 PR2). Empty `heads` block = current trainer behaviour, no change.
